{{Quote|That day, I was sharp. I flew circles around those TIE bastards and shot them all to hell. By the time reinforcements arrived, well … there wasn't much left.|[[Halley Kadorto]], to [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]]|<ref name="X-WingOSG" />}}
The '''Rescue at Mon Calamari''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] mission to free [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] being transported to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] ambushed a retreating Imperial fleet on the edge of the [[Mon Calamari system/Legends|Calamari system]] following the [[Calamarian Revolt]] and captured the transports carrying the slaves.

==Prelude==
{{Quote|We knew something was up around Mon Calamari, but we never suspected the Imperial scum would actually try to destroy the slave containers before we could get there.|Halley Kadorto, to Keyan Farlander|<ref name="X-WingOSG" />}}
In the aftermath of the [[Calamarian Revolt|uprising]] that liberated the planet [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], withdrawing [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces attempted to escape the [[Mon Calamari system/Legends|Calamari system]] and headed to the edge of the system.<ref name="SoR" /> [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] learned of a rendezvous between an Imperial convoy of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|freighters]] and [[Class-A cargo container|container]] transporting Mon Calamari slaves and materiél to the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Warrior (Star Destroyer)|''Warrior'']].<ref name="X-Wing" /> The bulk freighters were not designed to carry life forms but Mon Calamari slaves were brutally loaded in the overcrowded freighters. The Rebel leaders who were aware of the Imperial atrocities on Mon Calamari saw an opportunity to help the Calamarians and secure their cooperation against the Empire.<ref name="TFP" />

The Rebel [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] of [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] were sent to destroy the convoy's [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] escorts and identify the freighters' cargo. [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron's]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] would disable the vessels carrying the slaves, after which the freighters ''[[Citadel 1]]'' and ''[[Citadel 2]]'' would dock with them. The whole operation was planned to be completed before the ''Warrior'' arrived.<ref name="X-Wing" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|I saw the TIEs zeroing in on the distant containers and took off to see what they were up to. I wasn't following orders. Instinct, maybe. Luck. Doesn't matter much, does it?|Halley Kadorto, to Keyan Farlander|<ref name="X-WingOSG" />}}
After the ships arrived at Mon Calamari, fighter pilot [[Halley Kadorto]] used his [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] to identify which freighter and container carried the slaves. Red Squadron caught the defending [[TIE series/Legends|TIE starfighters]] out of position and they initially proved easy to keep away from the freighters. The mission was going according to plan until the ''Warrior'' arrived earlier than expected. Hoping to thwart the rescue, the ship's commander sent TIE Fighters to destroy the freighters with the slaves still inside. The X-wings were now outnumbered almost three to one and the TIEs were too numerous to contain.<ref name="TFP" />

Kadorto approached ''Warrior'' to engage the incoming TIEs. Though he called for assistance, his wingmates were all engaged and he was forced to work alone. Kadorto held off the attack by destroying wave-after-wave of TIEs until the rescue was finally completed and reinforcements arrived.<ref name="TFP" />

==Aftermath==
The mission was successful and Kadorto received the [[Kalidor Crescent/Legends|Kalidor Crescent]] for his heroism. The incident was ported into a simulated exercise for Rebel pilots and made Kadorto famous. The rescue went a long way to persuading the Mon Calamari to join the Rebel Alliance. They provided almost immediately their [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruisers]] to the Alliance<ref name="TFP" /> as well as their [[Mon Calamari Orbital Shipyards|orbital shipyards]].<ref name="SoR" />

==Behind the scenes==
In [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']], where this mission is recreated in the historical simulator, the TIE bombers attacking the slave freighters do no damage to them because they are friendly targets. For the mission to have worked properly, the slave vessels should have been set to neutral faction.<ref name="X-Wing" />
